text:
The is an Eldian family living under the rule of Marley in Liberio.

History

Leonhart was relocated from another country to Marley after his Eldian heritage was discovered. Years later, he adopted Annie as a baby after she was abandoned for similar reasons.

Annie was trained by her father from a young age so that she would be chosen to host one of the Nine Titans, which would improve his social status. Eventually Annie inherited of the Female Titan and the time came for her to partake in an attack on the Walls on behalf of Marley. Before she set out, her father apologized to her and assured her that regardless of what the world thought of her, she would always have her father on her side. He remained in Marley awaiting his daughter's return.

Story

Wall Sealing arc

After the Warriors' attack on Shiganshina District, Annie Leonhart joins the 104th Training Corps under secret orders. When the time comes for graduation, she participates in the battle of Trost District. After graduating from her Training Corps, she joins the Military Police Brigade while her Warrior comrades Reiner Braun and Bertolt Hoover join with the Survey Corps.

The Female Titan arc

Annie infiltrates the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls, devastating the mission as the Female Titan. A few days later, she is caught in Stohess District but crystallizes herself in a hardened skin shell, falling into stasis to prevent interrogation.

Return to Shiganshina arc

Shortly before the Battle of Shiganshina District, Bertolt remembers back to the Battle of Trost District, where Reiner had pressured Annie to take off Marco Bott's vertical maneuvering equipment, to prove that she and her father were different from the "evil race" within the Walls

Marley arc

Before the curtain's rise at Willy Tybur's production in Liberio, Leonhart speaks with Karina Braun, the latter praising Annie for having devoted her life to Marley. Leonhart refuses this, adamantly stating that she is alive, because she had promised to come home.

War for Paradis arc

Annie confides in Hitch and tells her about her family background and her father's wish to have her back. In the meantime, Leonhart fruitlessly tries to warn the Liberio gatekeepers that the rumbling started, and it is the thought of his daughter that gives him the strength to fight back.

Members

Legal members

Trivia

Leonhart is derived from the Spanish word león and the Dutch word hart. These words combined literally translate to Lionheart. Lionheart is a nickname that is given to someone who is a great warrior.
